title: Promises, Async Functions, and the Event Loop · Behavior Brief: Promise Combinators
summary: Coordinate status requests, deadlines, retries, and user cancellation without races or unhandled failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js promise combinators increment in a bounded asynchronous status coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose all, allSettled, race, or any from failure, completion, and cancellation semantics.
Use async and await as promise control flow without serializing independent work accidentally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
